title: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (13) + S2 'S' (12, eps 14-25) = 25 total. Paired with the Coolkyousinnjya manga (ongoing, ~19 volumes / ch. ~190 as of 2026, serialized in Monthly Action / Manga Action). The manga is largely episodic slice-of-life and KyoAni adapts it out of order, so chapter boundaries are approximate; volume anchors are firmer (S1 ~vols 1-3, S2 ~vols 4-6, film ~vol 8).

mappings.arc: Tohru & Kobayashi / Kanna's School → Tohru's Father (S1, vols 1-3)
Ilulu's Introduction / Elma's Daily Life (Dragon Maid S, vols 4-6)
Kanna's Father / Chaos-Harmony War & later episodic arcs (unadapted by TV; partly covered by the 2025 film)

movies.title: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid: A lonely dragon wants to be loved
movies.note: Canon KyoAni film set after Dragon Maid S, adapting the Kanna's father / Chaos-Harmony arc (~manga vol 8).
